name: UBA : User Access - Failed Access to Critical Assets
notes: This rule detects authentication failures for systems located in the Critical Assets reference set.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Access - Failed Access to Critical Assets on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Access - Failed Access to Critical Assets
Event description: senseValue=5,senseDesc='Authentication Failure to a critical asset.',usecase_id='09349955-1776-4545-bdc4-8aeee6bfb0f7'
